compress_excel_to_zip.name: compress_excel_to_zip
compress_excel_to_zip.description: Compress an Excel file (e.g., data_backup.xlsx) into a zip archive. Use when the user asks to zip a spreadsheet or any file into a .zip.

source_path.description: Path to the Excel file that should be compressed (e.g., 'data_backup.xlsx').

zip_path.description: Destination path for the created zip file (e.g., 'data_backup.zip').

check_file_for_word.name: check_file_for_word
check_file_for_word.description: Searches a file for a specific word or phrase. Use when user says: find, search, contains, check, locate, word

file_path.description: Path to the file to be examined

search_term.description: Word or phrase to look for within the file

take_screenshot.name: take_screenshot
take_screenshot.description: Captures the current screen. Use when user says: screenshot, screen capture, take screenshot, capture screen, snapshot, screen shot

filename.description: the filename to save the screenshot as

basic_arithmetic_operation.name: basic_arithmetic_operation
basic_arithmetic_operation.description: Performs simple arithmetic operations like addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division. Use when user says: calculate, add, sum, subtract, multiply

move_file_to_folder.name: move_file_to_folder
move_file_to_folder.description: Moves a file to a specified folder. Use when user says: move, file, folder, transfer, relocate, copy

file_name.description: The name of the file to be moved

destination_folder.description: The path to the destination folder

send_message_tool.name: send_message_tool
send_message_tool.description: Sends a message to a recipient. Use when user says: send message, send email, send text, send notification, send note

message.description: The content of the message to be sent
